name: daily-trading-thesis-agent
description: Local daily trading thesis report generator using mock data.

scripts.daily-check: node src/main.js && node scripts/verify-report.js && node scripts/screenshot-report.js
scripts.daily-check:win: node src/main.js && node scripts/verify-report.js && node scripts/screenshot-report.js
scripts.daily-check:real-test: node scripts/run-fetch-real-data.js && node src/main.js --real-test && node scripts/verify-report.js && node scripts/screenshot-report.js
scripts.daily-check:us: node scripts/run-fetch-real-data.js --market us && node src/main.js --market us --real-test && node scripts/verify-report.js --market us && node scripts/screenshot-report.js --market us
scripts.daily-check:kr: node scripts/run-fetch-real-data.js --market kr && node src/main.js --market kr --real-test && node scripts/verify-report.js --market kr && node scripts/screenshot-report.js --market kr
scripts.daily-publish: npm.cmd run daily-check:win && npm.cmd run prepare-pages
scripts.daily-publish:real-test: node scripts/run-fetch-real-data.js && node src/main.js --real-test && node scripts/verify-report.js && node scripts/screenshot-report.js && node scripts/prepare-pages.js
scripts.daily-publish:us: node scripts/run-fetch-real-data.js --market us && node src/main.js --market us --real-test && node scripts/verify-report.js --market us && node scripts/screenshot-report.js --market us && node scripts/prepare-pages.js --market us
scripts.daily-publish:kr: node scripts/run-fetch-real-data.js --market kr && node src/main.js --market kr --real-test && node scripts/verify-report.js --market kr && node scripts/screenshot-report.js --market kr && node scripts/prepare-pages.js --market kr
